title: An upgraded version of Roblox launches on PS5 today – PlayStation.Blog
description: Enjoy smoother and more responsive gameplay with up to 30% faster load times

summaryHistory.summary: “When Dueling Grounds was early in development, I spent a lot of time playtesting other console games on Roblox to better understand what players want from a high-quality action game,” said Wingboy0. “When Dueling Grounds was early in development, I spent a lot of time playtesting other console g...
